articles.author: Carolyn Y. Johnson
articles.title: NASA’s Artemis II lifts off on historic moon mission - washingtonpost.com
articles.description: Four astronauts are expected to loop around the moon in a risky, technically challenging 10-day mission.
articles.content:
Four astronauts lifted off before sunset Wednesday, starting a historic 10-day journey to fly by the moon and propel people farther into space than they have ever gone before.
The Artemis II mission… [+280 chars]

articles.author: Zack Whittaker
articles.title: Apple releases security fix for older iPhones and iPads to protect against DarkSword attacks - TechCrunch
articles.description: The security update protects a raft of older iPhones and iPads from attacks linked to leaked hacking tools called DarkSword.
articles.content:
Apple has pushed a security update to older iPhones and iPads that protects against a leaked set of powerful hacking tools capable of stealing data from a person’s device.
